flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Davidson College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.2k → $64.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Davidson College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.2k → $64.4k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Davidson College are 78% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($81.4k vs $45.7k).
